content: TASK-066 checkpoint done: Prototype map routing now uses the same SVG edge path machinery as Overview. Prototype edges are rendered as paths through buildEdgePaths(), so overlapping horizontal/vertical segments receive parallel offsets and crossing gaps instead of piling into shared lanes. The Prototype map viewport border was removed. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, npm run build, and browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/ confirmed pathCount=15, polylineCount=0, flow border=0px none, and Play still works. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is broader layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
